parts.text: Compare INC-2026-0001 with similar incidents and summarize what was different.

data.title: Payment service outage affecting order placement
Checkout failures due to payment timeout
data.summary: Customers could not complete checkout for 53 minutes.

data.resolution_summary: Rolled back payment-service release and increased timeout budget.
data.root_cause: A misconfigured HTTP client timeout in payment-service caused cascading retries.

data.title: Payment service outage affecting order placement
data.summary: Payment API downtime caused checkout failures and degraded order flow.
